# Trade Compliance Classification Engine

Repo: https://github.com/kingsleyonoh/trade-compliance-classification-engine.git

Multi-tenant Rust/Axum compliance workbench that converts product catalogs into explainable HS/HTS recommendations, duty estimates, risk bands, reviewer queues, and immutable audit packs.

## Install / Run

- Install: `cargo build`
- Infra: `docker compose up -d`
- Dev: `cargo run`
- Setup: `cargo run --bin setup`
- Tests: `cargo test`

## Architecture

Rust 1.78+, Axum, PostgreSQL 16/sqlx, Tantivy local search, wasmtime rule runtime, Askama/HTMX/Tailwind UI, Tokio workers, Prometheus metrics.

## API Surface

Health: `GET /health`, `/health/db`, `/health/ready`.
Tenant bootstrap: `POST /api/tenants/register`, `GET /tenants/me`.
Products: `POST /api/products/import`, `GET /api/products`, `GET /api/products/:id`.
Classifications: `POST /api/classifications/run`, `GET /api/classifications`, `GET /api/classifications/:id`, `POST /api/classifications/:id/override`.
Rule packs: `POST /api/rule-packs`, `POST /api/rule-packs/:id/validate`, `POST /api/rule-packs/:id/activate`.
Exports: `POST /api/audit-exports`, `GET /api/audit-exports/:id/download`.
Integrations: `GET /api/integrations`, `PUT /api/integrations/:provider`.
Backtests: `POST /api/backtests/run`.

## Integrations

Optional RAG Platform, Notification Hub, and Workflow Automation Engine. Core classification, review, and audit export must work with all adapters disabled.
